217821 /bin/bash -l -c cd '/workspace' >/dev/null 2>&1 && set -a; [ -f /etc/environment ] && . /etc/environment >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; set +a; export PDK_ROOT=${PDK_ROOT:-/nc/apps/pdk}; export NC_LIB_ROOT=${NC_LIB_ROOT:-/nc/apps}; export NC_SOCGEN_ROOT=${NC_SOCGEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/nc_socgen}; export PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT=${PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/padframe-gen}; export NC_RV32_ROOT=${NC_RV32_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_rv32/v1.1.0}; export NC_AMBA_ROOT=${NC_AMBA_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_amba/v1.1.0};  (# Monitor synthesis progress ??? poll every 90 seconds for up to 3 hours WRAPPER_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper" LOG="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log"  for i in $(seq 1 120); do   sleep 90   STEP=$(ls -td "$WRAPPER_DIR/runs/wrapper_run/"[0-9]* 2>/dev/null | head -1)   LAST_LINES=$(tail -3 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null)   YOSYS_PID=$(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize.py" 2>/dev/null)   OR_PID=$(pgrep -f "openroad" 2>/dev/null | head -1)   LR_PID=$(pgrep -f "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null)    echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Poll $i | LibreLane PID: ${LR_PID:-none} | Yosys: ${YOSYS_PID:-done} | OpenROAD: ${OR_PID:-none}"   echo "  Current step dir: $STEP"   echo "  Last log lines: $LAST_LINES"   echo ""    # If librelane is done, break   if [ -z "$LR_PID" ]; then     echo "LibreLane process exited. Checking results..."     break   fi done)
220240 /bin/bash -l -c cd '/workspace' >/dev/null 2>&1 && set -a; [ -f /etc/environment ] && . /etc/environment >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; set +a; export PDK_ROOT=${PDK_ROOT:-/nc/apps/pdk}; export NC_LIB_ROOT=${NC_LIB_ROOT:-/nc/apps}; export NC_SOCGEN_ROOT=${NC_SOCGEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/nc_socgen}; export PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT=${PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT:-/nc/apps/padframe-gen}; export NC_RV32_ROOT=${NC_RV32_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_rv32/v1.1.0}; export NC_AMBA_ROOT=${NC_AMBA_ROOT:-/nc/ip/nc_amba/v1.1.0};  (tail -5 /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/wrapper_run.log 2>/dev/null echo "---" pgrep -fa "librelane-wrapped" 2>/dev/null | head -3)
